reviews.comment:
Un poco chico el local y el tele prendido muy fuerte. Lo mejor es el parque de atrás y la ubicación. Y en Google no aparece como YPF FULL, importante agregar eso para saber que se puede parar a comer

(Translated by Google)
The place is a bit small and the TV is on too loud. The best thing is the park in the back and the location. And it doesn't appear as YPF FULL on Google, which is important to know so you know you can stop for a bite to eat.

reviews.comment:
Fui luego de un año y las chicas me recordaban, me sorprendió gratamente, súper simpáticos todos, siempre atentos. Las habitaciones me encantan. Siempre que viajo paro ahí aunque sea a tomarme un café. Muchas gracias por la excelente atención.

(Translated by Google)
I went back a year later, and the girls remembered me. I was pleasantly surprised. Everyone was super friendly and always attentive. I love the rooms. Whenever I travel, I stop there, even if it's just for a coffee. Thank you so much for the excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21aQ1YwVTVOMGh6VjNOQ1JVcFpTMDVUY1hGcmQyYxAB
